name: Triple Chocolate Chunk Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup pecans (4 ounces), toasted and chopped
2 ounces semisweet chocolate, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
2 ounces milk chocolate, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
2 ounces white chocolate, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Adjust oven rack to center position and heat oven to 275 degrees. Place pie shell in the oven if not already warm.
2. Melt butter in a medium heatproof bowl set over simmering water. Remove bowl from skillet and mix sugar and salt with a wooden spoon until butter is absorbed. Beat eggs, then corn syrup and vanilla into the mixture. Return bowl to hot water; stir until the mixture is shiny and warm to the touch (about 130 degrees). Remove from heat and stir in pecans.
3. Pour mixture into warm shell. Scatter chocolate pieces over pecan mixture. Gently press them into the filling with the back of a wooden spoon.
4. Bake until center feels set yet soft, like gelatin when gently pressed (55 to 65 minutes). Transfer pie to a rack; let cool completely for at least 4 hours before serving at room temperature or warm with lightly sweetened whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
